<?php namespace Cviebrock\EloquentSluggable\Tests\Models; /** * Class PostWithOnUpdate. * * A test model that uses the onUpdate functionality. */ class PostWithOnUpdate extends Post { /** * Return the sluggable configuration array for this model. */ public function sluggable(): array { return [ 'slug' => [ 'source' => 'title', 'onUpdate' => true, ], ]; } }
